headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Best Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Apple, Bloom Energy, Circle Internet Group, First Solar, Halliburton, IBM, Intuit, Newmont, SK hynix, and More
summary: Iran fired on ships, Trump answered with missiles and seized the Strait of Hormuz, and Wall Street spent Tuesday sorting out who gets hurt and who benefits. Analysts at KeyBanc, HSBC, and Mizuho made some bold calls you may not see coming.

headline: This Halliburton Analyst Turns Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Upgrades For Tuesday
summary: Analysts upgraded HAL, TKO, RRR, FCEL, and IRT stocks, with raised price targets. Check out other analysts' views and ratings on these stocks.

headline: Seaport Global Upgrades TKO Group Holdings to Buy, Announces $210 Price Target
summary: Seaport Global  analyst David Joyce   upgrades TKO Group Holdings (NYSE:TKO) from Neutral to Buy and announces $210 price target.
